subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letters thou didst write to Jinab-i-Manshadi have been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیبی که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نمودی ملاحظه گردید از حوادث و
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @growth of the Cause, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @non-participation in politics, @love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
